title: federal_reserve / balance_sheet / quantitative_tightening | Fed Balance Sheet | Annual Report on Open Market Operations - FEDERAL RESERVE BA...
summary: The Federal Reserve's SOMA portfolio decreased by nearly $700 billion during 2024, driven by balance sheet runoff under FOMC-directed monthly caps. The FOMC slowed the pace of runoff in June by reducing the Treasury redemption cap from $60 billion to $25 billion per month. Treasury holdings fell from $4.79 trillion to $4.29 trillion while agency MBS holdings declined from $2.42 trillion to $2.23 trillion.
